info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: nityamaDipUrvakaH  ' ayatyetIyate gatyAm  aDIteDyeti ceNiko: ' (Slo. 14) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kiyat svidindro aDyeti mAtuH kiyat pituH' (f0 41712) aDyeti smarati
